app_release_notes: v1.2.15 - Create New Load now files your current load to Past Loads and starts a fresh one (the button previously re-showed your old screen). And after you plan your ladder it walks you to Measure Target to add your groups, then Import your chronograph, then Results -- the full guided flow, measure first.
